data.title: Uniswap (UNI) Falls 6% as Institutions Offload $82M, Still Up 20% in a Month
data.description:
• UNI token plummets 5.59% in 24 hours, dropping from $6.658 to $6.286 amid heightened market volatility.
  • Major institutional addresses moved over 11.65 million UNI tokens ($82.38M) to Coinbase Prime, following another 9 million UNI deposit just two weeks prior.
  • Uniswap introduces one-click swaps for smart wallets with EIP-5792 support, aiming to improve user experience despite market turbulence.

data.title: 0x Acquires Competitor Flood in Push to Boost Share of $2.3B DEX Aggregator Market
data.description:
• 0x said it bought rival Flood to enhance its competitiveness in the DEX aggregation market.
  • The acquisition was driven by Flood's proprietary software and its team of developers.
  • 0x aims to leverage the acquisition to offer better trade prices and capture market share from larger aggregators.

data.title: Shiba Inu (SHIB) Price Drops 7% in 24 Hours but Remains Up 25% Over the Past Month
data.description:
• US and China announce significant tariff reductions, with US cutting from 145% to 30% and China reducing from 125% to 10% for the next 90 days, easing global trade tensions.
  • US inflation fell to 2.3% in April, reaching its lowest level since 2021, alleviating concerns about tariff-related inflation spikes.
  • SHIB experienced a sharp 6.4% decline over 24 hours, dropping from 0.0000159 to 0.0000149, with trading volume spiking to 1.43 trillion SHIB during peak selling, according to CoinDesk Research's technical analysis data model.

data.title: Bitcoin, Strategy Confirm Concurrent Bull Cross, Strengthening Uptrend Signal: Technical Analysis
data.description:
• Bitcoin and MSTR concurrently flashed a bullish signal, indicating a potential major uptrend.
  • Other indicators support the signal, though a bull-market pullback remains possible.

data.title: Bitcoin Backed Token YBTC Comes to Sui as Bitlayer Integrates Its BitVM Bridge to Sui Network
data.description:
• Bitlayer and Sui have partnered to introduce Peg-BTC, a Bitcoin-backed token, into Sui's DeFi ecosystem.
  • The integration implemented via the BitVM bridge allows bitcoin holders to earn yields by using Peg-BTC within Sui's decentralized finance protocols.
  • Sui's ecosystem now supports various BitcoinFi integrations, enhancing bitcoin's utility beyond being a store of value.

data.title: MoonPay Users Can Now Make Stablecoins to Make Payments With Mastercard  Partnership
data.description:
• MoonPay and Mastercard will enable stablecoin payments across 150 million global businesses.
  • Crypto wallets will gain access to virtual Mastercards for spending digital dollars
  • The move builds on Mastercard’s push to streamline digital asset transactions.

data.title: Key Reasons Monero Surge Continues Even as Bitcoin Bulls Take a Breather
data.description:
• Monero (XMR) has risen 4.6% this week, outperforming other top 100 tokens, while bitcoin has declined.
  • The cryptocurrency's rally is supported by a favorable regulatory outlook and upcoming privacy feature upgrades.
  • Rumors of major exchanges relisting monero have likely added to the bullish momentum.

data.title: Metaplanet’s Leverages Its Bitcoin Stash of Over 5K BTC to Generate Record Profit of $4M
data.description:
• Metaplanet generated 592 million yen in operating profit in Q1 2025, primarily from bitcoin-based income strategies.
  • The company’s bitcoin holdings increased by over 5,000 BTC to reach 6,796 BTC over the quarter.
  • Metaplanet raised 86.1 billion yen through bond sales, equity issuance, and stock warrants to finance its bitcoin accumulation.

data.title: Capital Creeps Back Into Solana as On-Chain Demand Shows Early Signs of Recovery
data.description:
• Solana (SOL) is experiencing a return of capital inflows after several weeks of outflows, according to Glassnode data.
  • The 30-day realized cap inflows for SOL are growing at a rate of 4–5%, indicating a potential trend reversal.
  • Realized cap inflows suggest that buy-side pressure may be returning, even if the price action has not yet fully responded.

data.title: Coinbase Says Criminals Stole Customer Data, Offers $20M Bug Bounty
data.description:
• Coinbase (COIN) revealed that user data was breached by a group of rogue support agents that were "bribed" by cyber criminals.
  • The revelation comes after on-chain sleuth ZachXBT claimed that Coinbase users had lost $300 million to social engineering scams.
  • The exchange added that it will reimburse any impacted users.
